description: Escalating bounty hunters sent after Wayn (the Mythless) as the heat clock fills. Each tier is more dangerous and more personal than the last. No guard swarms — these are professionals working the hunter network.
spawn_rule: When mythless_bounty_heat fills (reaches max), spawn the hunter at current tier, reset clock to 0, advance tier by +1.

tiers.name: Agna Stonewatch
tiers.location_hint: Roadside ambush or inn approach, Whiterun Hold

aspects.high_concept: Hard-Nosed Nord Tracker Working a Fresh Lead
other_aspects: Paid Up Front, Needs the Second Half
Knows a Redguard Swordsman When She Sees One

stunts: Trail Sense: +2 to Notice when tracking a target she has observed in person before.
First Strike: Once per scene, act first in an exchange regardless of initiative order.
tiers.gm_notes: Agna is a working hunter, not a zealot. She approached a contact in a caravan who described a Redguard swordsman. She will negotiate, retreat if badly outmatched, and report back to the network — advancing the chain — rather than die for pride.
tiers.on_defeat_or_driven_off: Word gets back. The next tier hunter receives a detailed description and known alias.

tiers.name: Verek Ashbrand
tiers.location_hint: Planned intercept at a known route or settlement, any hold

aspects.high_concept: Dunmer Blade Who Collects Reputations Like Trophies
aspects.trouble: Needs to Win This One to Restore His Standing
other_aspects: A Ledger Entry and a Personal Grudge
He's Heard of the Mythless — That's Why He Took the Job
Fights to Embarrass, Then to Kill

stunts: Duelist's Edge: When fighting one-on-one with no allies present for either combatant in the same zone, +2 to Fight attack rolls.
Read the Room: Once per scene, ask the GM one question about an NPC's intent and receive an honest answer.
Reputation Bait: +2 to Provoke when invoking the target's own reputation or title against them.
tiers.gm_notes: Verek has been briefed by Agna's report and knows Wayn is Ansei-trained. He will attempt to bait Wayn into a duel in front of witnesses — a public loss humiliates the target and pays more. He is dangerous in a straight fight and will use the 'Mythless' title as a taunt.
tiers.on_defeat_or_driven_off: Verek survives and sends a detailed combat report to the tier-3 contact. The hunter network now knows the Shehai is real.

tiers.name: Mira Coldchain
tiers.location_hint: Operates through intermediaries; direct confrontation in a city (Whiterun, Windhelm, Riften)

aspects.high_concept: Imperial Network Broker Who Turns Leads Into Traps
aspects.trouble: This Has Become Personal After Verek's Report
other_aspects: She Never Gets Her Hands Dirty First
Every Innkeeper in Skyrim Owes Her a Favor
She Knows You'll Need to Rest Eventually

stunts: Informant Web: Once per session, reveal that an NPC the party trusted has been in contact with Mira. Place the scene aspect 'Compromised Source' (2 free invokes for Mira or her agents).
Prepared Ambush: When Mira has at least one scene of advance warning, she may place 'Surrounded' as a boost before combat begins.
Ledger Never Lies: +2 to Create Advantage using Contacts or Deceive when exploiting a paper trail left by Wayn.
tiers.gm_notes: Mira is a coordinator, not a fighter. She operates through proxies (local thugs, crooked innkeepers, off-duty legionnaires). Confronting her directly requires navigating her network of favors and informants first. Defeating her collapses the current hunter chain — the Empire loses the thread for at least an act.
tiers.on_defeat_or_driven_off: The network goes quiet. Heat resets to 0 and tier resets to 1 (the chain breaks). A major victory — but someone in Cyrodiil filed the original contract, and it will resurface.
